parameters.body:
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-3-5-sonnet-20240620', max_tokens: 1024, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'You are a B2B sales expert. Analyze this lead and produce:
1. Lead quality SCORE out of 10 with 2-line reason
2. Personalized cold EMAIL (subject + body, max 120 words)
3. LinkedIn DM (max 60 words)

Our service: AI automation and workflow solutions

Lead:
- Company: ' + $json.company + ' (' + $json.industry + ', ' + $json.size + ')
- Contact: ' + $json.contact + ' — ' + $json.title + '
- Pain points: ' + $json.pain_points + '
- Website: ' + $json.website + '

Respond ONLY with valid JSON:
{
  "score": <1-10>,
  "score_reason": "<2 lines>",
  "email": { "subject": "<subject>", "body": "<body>" },
  "linkedin_dm": "<msg>"
}' }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-3-5-sonnet-20240620', max_tokens: 4000, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'Generate a complete, single-file HTML landing page (dark theme) for ' + $json.company + '. Personalized for ' + $json.contact + '. Highlights: how our AI automation solves ' + $json.pain_points + '. \nRequirements: dark gradient background, premium feel, 3 benefit icons, Call to Action button. Respond ONLY with raw HTML code starting with <!DOCTYPE html>.' }] }) }}

parameters.subject: ={{ $json.email_subject }} (Lead: {{ $json.company }})
